event: Meleager and Atalanta hunting the Calydonian boar
description: A black-and-white engraving depicting a violent hunting scene in a dense forest. Multiple figures on horseback and on foot engage with a large boar amid fallen hunters and attacking dogs. The action is intense and chaotic, with rearing horses and figures in dynamic combat poses. Bare trees frame the scene, and a winged figure appears in the smoky sky above. Bodies of fallen hunters lie on the ground. The inscription 'Meleager et Atalanta' appears at the bottom center.

_meta.title: The Sibyls in the Church of St. Our Lady of Peace
